seo.title: Vigil Services Ltd — care, staffing, security and cleaning
seo.description: Vigil Services Ltd is the parent group behind four specialist divisions — care and support, healthcare staffing, security and commercial cleaning. Choose the service you need.

nap.address: Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU

fields.heading: Vigil Services Ltd
fields.sub: Four specialist divisions providing care, healthcare staffing, security and commercial cleaning. Choose the service you need.
fields._note: Four fixed division image slots (order + set are governed by the framework). State A: no image url -> polished placeholder. State B: add a url to a division's image to replace that slot only. image_alt describes the intended founder-approved subject; it becomes the alt text when a real image lands.

images.image_alt: A care worker in a white tunic with navy neckline and sleeve trim offering companionship and home support to an individual — dignified and non-clinical.
Care professionals in white tunics with navy trim in a care-home or provider setting, representing staff supplied to organisations.
A professional security officer in a calm, trustworthy posture in a commercial setting — no weapons or militarised presentation.
A commercial cleaning professional with modern equipment in a credible workplace environment.

items.title: Care Services
items.body: Non-clinical care and support for individuals at home — companionship, home help and respite.

items.title: Care Staffing
items.body: Temporary and permanent care staff supplied to care homes and providers.

items.title: Security Services
items.body: Manned guarding, mobile patrols and event security.

items.title: Cleaning Services
items.body: Commercial cleaning for offices, construction and healthcare settings.

fields.body: Vigil Services Ltd is registered in England and Wales, company number 11756806, at Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU.

fields.heading: Contact us
fields.heading_sub: For general enquiries, email us. For a specific service, choose a division above.
